message:
fix(vfs): use std::io::Error::other() for clippy io_other_error lint

Nightly clippy introduced the `io_other_error` lint which flags
`std::io::Error::new(std::io::ErrorKind::Other, msg)` as unnecessarily
verbose when `std::io::Error::other(msg)` is available (stabilized in
Rust 1.74). The write-offset overflow error in MemoryVfs::write()
was the sole instance.

Before: `std::io::Error::new(std::io::ErrorKind::Other, "write offset + length overflow")`
After:  `std::io::Error::other("write offset + length overflow")`

No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
